assertions.description: R2 (10k) + C7 (1.0uF) forming a 15.92 Hz low-pass filter on the OLED RESET line is correctly detected. The reset_pin design observation for U1 (OLED) correctly identifies the pullup and filter capacitor. The RC filter cutoff of 15.92 Hz is accurate for 10k/1.0uF.

INCORRECT: The i2c_bus design observation for the SDA net lists U1 twice in the devices array because the OLED (SSD1306 compatible) has two pins (pin 17 = D1/MOSI and pin 18 = D2) connected to the SDA net in I2C mode. While technically accurate at the pin level, reporting a single component twice in the device list is misleading for I2C bus analysis.
